title: Flying Book
result_description: You mime throwing a book; it spins toward camera, slows so you can read it, then spins back and you catch it — the spinning book is a green-screen composite scaled in over the throw.

inputs.name: throw_clip
inputs.what_to_film: Locked-off, exposure-locked shot: hold the book thin in your hand, mime throwing it, freeze in motion, then mime catching it. Leave extra time (you can speed up later). Match your lighting to the green-screen shot.

capture_requirements.note: single light source; hold book edge-on so the composite can hide it

inputs.name: greenscreen_book
inputs.what_to_film: The book hung on fishing line in front of a green screen, lit to match the throw shot; spin it (let it unwind for the smoothest rotation). Shoot at 60fps; keep the book inside the green frame at all times.

capture_requirements.note: no shadows/hotspots on the green; object never leaves the green frame

params.note: split at the throw and right before the catch to mark the in/out of the fly section
the unwind was filmed spinning the wrong way; reverse so it spins toward camera; aim for ~2 full rotations
mid-tone green; boost intensity to kill the fishing line; boost shadow to fill holes
crop the green-screen edges; keep the book from crossing the mask edge while it spins
place over the throw to hide the real book in your hand
fast spin in, 0.5x slow-mo in the middle to read it, fast spin back; fit all of it inside the marked in/out
small at the throw, scaling up to 170 as it flies toward camera
reverse of the in-move: 170 down to book size as it flies back to your hand
right-click the green clips → create compound clip, then apply Motion Blur (won't apply correctly over a raw speed change) to smooth the spin edges
brighten exposure, lift shadows, cool slightly to match the scene
add whoosh SFX at throw / slow-mo / catch (slow to 0.5x, ~ -3dB) + a trending track with a beat drop aligned to the throw

result.description: Book flies from your hand, spins toward camera, slows to read, spins back, and you catch it.
success_criteria: Real book stays hidden behind the composite the whole flight
Clean green key (fishing line gone) with the book never crossing the mask edge
Smooth scale + spin with motion blur, slow-mo readable in the middle
